function.message: Processed the next inbox request by OCR-normalizing the three Foundry-related bill notes in 50_finance/purchases into YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS files when entering folders, used the next-inbox workflow, treated the inbox request as non-canonical until verified against the Foundry entity and the finance records, applied the OCR workflow plus finance frontmatter schema, preserved original bill bodies, and deleted the completed inbox item per 00_inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Foundry. The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/foundry.md established Foundry as the relevant system. Search results and the read purchase notes showed three bill records with related_entity set to Foundry: the ESP32 order, the domain and mail setup bill, and the ESP32 top-up order. Each note contained visible bill fields and line items but lacked YAML frontmatter, so adding bill frontmatter according to 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md satisfied the OCR workflow in 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md. After completion, deleting 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was required by the inbox workflow and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD.
completed_steps_laconic: write YAML frontmatter to 3 bill notes
